name: Blue Eagle Lithium Inc.
summary: Blue Eagle Lithium Inc. engages in identifying, evaluating, and developing early-stage lithium exploration opportunities in North America. It holds a 100% working interest in the Railroad Valley project, which covers an area of 5,520 acres located in Railroad Valley, Nevada. The company was formerly known as Wishbone Pet Products Inc. and changed its name to Blue Eagle Lithium Inc. in July 2018. Blue Eagle Lithium Inc. was founded in 2009 and is based in Henderson, Nevada.
